message:
perf(http): reduce worker threads to 1, enable keep-alive, and widen supervisor probe interval

Fix CPU-pegging idle wake storms and TUI render flashing caused by
multi-worker asupersync runtimes: default to 1 HTTP worker thread
(overridable via AM_HTTP_WORKER_THREADS), re-enable keep-alive to
avoid per-request TCP churn from frequent /ws-state polls, and widen
supervisor health probe interval from 2s to 10s. Simplify TUI diff
config to use defaults instead of manual tuning. Add health status
detail display in system_health TUI screen.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
